## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or docs updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, runtime state, object cache, or local `.hypertide/` files added
- [ ] Public workspace still builds without private repository access
- [ ] Community/Enterprise boundary is respected
